creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port with respect to vftool by which tranform
	between NTT and ASCII japanese TeX dvi files or could make use of
	ASCII japanese Takegaki style.

	I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

	Packed tarball is

		5537 Sep 22 20:56 ja-vftool-1.2.tar.gz

	Packed list is

		    0 Sep 22 20:54 1997 vftool/
		 4244 Sep 22 20:54 1997 vftool/Makefile
		    0 Sep 19 17:46 1997 vftool/patches/
		  196 Sep 19 09:29 1997 vftool/patches/patch-ab
		    0 Sep 19 17:45 1997 vftool/pkg/
		   51 Sep 12 21:21 1997 vftool/pkg/COMMENT
		 1070 Sep 19 17:45 1997 vftool/pkg/DESCR
		  401 Sep 19 09:38 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.a2n
		15555 Sep 19 09:38 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.n2a
		  794 Sep 19 09:37 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.a2bk
		   24 Sep 18 21:41 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.rot
		  415 Sep 19 09:38 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.p2pn
		  417 Sep 19 09:38 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.tjsy
		  773 Sep 19 09:36 1997 vftool/pkg/PLIST.tjsypk
		    0 Sep 19 13:42 1997 vftool/files/
		  119 Mar 11 20:28 1997 vftool/files/md5
